name: Beat Machine
description: A native Möbius 32-step sequencer with drum-kit voices, custom recordings, BPM control, and simple effects.
author: mobius-os

offline.reads_detail: Beat Machine stores sequencer state through window.mobius.storage. The 32-step grid, BPM, recorded pads, volumes, and effects are read-through cached and writes queue while offline; the app code is cached by the offline_capable flag.
